title: Alla vi barn i Bullerbyn
actors: Kaj Andersson, Tove Hellbom, Jan Erik Husbom
plot: Bullerbyn is a village in Småland. There are three farms. In Mellangården, Lisa lives with his brothers Lasse and Bosse. In Norrgården, the sisters Britta and Anna live and Olle lives in Sörgården together with his little sister K...
